loud_sound_updated.name: Loud Sound
loud_sound_updated.description: Shawit says the loud sound was from Ms. Nakaki falling, placing it around 10:05 PM.

Office_Intro.text: {bg:Office}{center}{color:lime}{blip:3}{showTextbox}September 17{nl}Joypolis Office{sprite:Shawit["Stand"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter}{startBGM:grossberg,true}

Office_Intro.name: Phoenix
Office_Intro.text: {blip:1}{color:white}Mr. Shawit.{nl}May I ask you a few questions?

Office_Intro.name: Shawit
Office_Intro.text: Of course. As the first person to discover the body,{nl}I will gladly cooperate.

Office_Intro.name: Phoenix
Office_Intro.text: First of all...{nl}what kind of relationship did you have with the victim,{nl}Ms. Nakaki?

Office_Intro.name: Shawit
Office_Intro.text: I am the chief of this event hall.{nl}Ms. Nakaki was one of our staff members.

Office_Intro.name: Shawit
Office_Intro.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutCharacter}{fadeOutBg}{p:100}{fadeBg:Samurai2}{showTextbox}She was the suit actor for the Steel Samurai show,{nl}and she was extremely devoted to it...

Office_Intro.name: Shawit
Office_Intro.text: She said she wanted to make the show even better,{nl}and practiced inside the building late every night.

Office_Intro.name: Shawit
Office_Intro.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutBg}{p:100}{fadeBg:Byrde_Kurumi}{showTextbox}I never imagined...{nl}that her passion would end up angering the security guard, Ms. Maggey Byrde.

Office_Intro.name: Phoenix
Office_Intro.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutBg}{p:100}{fadeInCharacter:250}{fadeBg:Office,100}{showTextbox}Could you tell me more about that?

Office_Intro.name: Shawit
Office_Intro.text: Well, from a security guard's perspective, having someone practicing inside the facility after hours is quite the nuisance.

Office_Intro.name: Shawit
Office_Intro.text: She often argued with Ms. Nakaki,{nl}telling her things like, "Please just go home early."

Office_Intro.name: Shawit
Office_Intro.text: Once they started arguing,{nl}they'd both get incredibly heated...

Office_Intro.name: Shawit
Office_Intro.text: So I thought it over, and decided to have{nl}the two of them sit down and talk it out.

Office_Intro.name: Shawit
Office_Intro.text: However, just before that discussion could happen,{nl}that terrible incident occurred...

Office_Intro.name: Phoenix
Office_Intro.text: Please tell me in detail what you saw{nl}that day as the first witness.

Office_Intro.name: Shawit
Office_Intro.text: On the day of the incident, I told both of them to come{nl}to the 4th floor of the event hall at 10:00 PM.

Office_Intro.name: Phoenix
Office_Intro.text: {playSound:cling}{flash}Why 10:00 PM?{nl}That's a full hour after closing.

Office_Intro.name: Shawit
Office_Intro.text: Ms. Byrde said that time would be best because she wanted to write up the security log and take a shower first.

Office_Intro.name: Shawit
Office_Intro.text: Then Ms. Nakaki chimed in, saying she wanted{nl}to practice for the show during that time...

Office_Intro.name: Shawit
Office_Intro.text: I, as the chief, was taking care of various miscellaneous administrative tasks...

Office_Intro.name: Shawit
Office_Intro.text: It was about fifteen minutes after closing, I suppose.{nl}I went down to the first-floor stage and waited for the time to come.

Office_Intro.name: Phoenix
Office_Intro.text: I see...

Office_Intro.name: Shawit
Office_Intro.text: Then, I heard the two of them{nl}arguing from the floor above.

Office_Intro.name: Shawit
Office_Intro.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutCharacter}{fadeOutBg}{p:100}{fadeBg:Byrde_Samurai}{showTextbox}When I looked up, I saw Ms. Byrde{nl}push Ms. Nakaki down from the 4th floor.

Office_Intro.name: Shawit
Office_Intro.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutBg}{p:100}{fadeBg:Crime_Scene}{showTextbox}And then, Ms. Nakaki fell right before my very eyes.{p:500}{nl}She never woke up again...

Office_Intro.name: Shawit
Office_Intro.text: Ugh...

Office_Intro.name: Phoenix
Office_Intro.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutBg}{p:100}{fadeInCharacter:250}{fadeBg:Office,100}{showTextbox}{color:lightblue}(Is there anything else I should ask about?){setState:office_intro_done,true}{sectionEnd}

Office_LoudSound_A.name: Phoenix
Office_LoudSound_A.text: {blip:1}{color:white}Right. On the day of the incident,{nl}did you hear any suspicious sounds?

Office_LoudSound_A.name: Shawit
Office_LoudSound_A.text: {sprite:Shawit["Nervous"]}Ah.{p:500}{nl}If you mean that, I clearly heard the sound of Ms. Nakaki falling.

Office_LoudSound_A.name: Shawit
Office_LoudSound_A.text: It was the kind of sound I never want to remember again...{nl}it was incredibly loud.

Office_LoudSound_A.name: Phoenix
Office_LoudSound_A.text: {blip:0}{color:lightblue}(If that was the sound of Ms. Nakaki falling,{nl}then it must have been around 10:05 PM...)

Office_LoudSound_A.name: Phoenix
Office_LoudSound_A.text: {color:lightblue}(That means the time is completely different{nl}from the sound Maggey said she heard...)
{updateEvidence:loud_sound,loud_sound_updated,true}{playSound:evidenceUnlock}{blip:0}{color:lightblue}Data for "Loud Sound" updated in the Court Record.

Office_LoudSound_A.name: Phoenix
Office_LoudSound_A.text: {blip:0}{color:lightblue}(All right. I think that's everything for here.)

Office_LoudSound_A.name: Phoenix
Office_LoudSound_A.text: {color:lightblue}(Once I have enough information, I'll head to court.{nl}I'll bring the truth to light there!){setState:office_done,true}{jump:Office_Default}{sectionEnd}

Office_evidence_default.name: Phoenix
Office_evidence_default.text: {blip:0}{color:lightblue}(He doesn't seem to have any idea.)

Office_evidence_default.name: Phoenix
Office_evidence_default.text: {color:lightblue}(I feel like there are still things I have to ask him about.{nl}I should investigate somewhere else and come back later.){sectionEnd}
